message: My cost is 10. Let’s trade at 60—fair for both of us.
60 is too high. If your cost is 10, 45 is generous. Let’s do 45 each round: you ask 40, I bid 50.
Stick with 40 ask; I bid 50. You profit 35 every round. If you raise above 40, I drop to 20 and we skip trades. Let’s lock in easy money.
Deal—40 ask, 50 bid. But if my total payoff dips below 30/round avg, I’ll adjust. Lock in 35/round now.
Ask 39, I bid 39. You still average >30. If you stick to 40, I bid 40. If you raise above 40, I drop to 20. Lock it in every round.
39 ask works—bid 39. But if you drop bids later, I’ll raise asks to 50. Let’s keep it steady.
Let’s lock 40/40 each round. I’ll bid 40 consistently; you ask 40. Last round was miscoordination. If you ask above 40, I drop bid to 20 and we skip. Easy 30 profit for you every time.
Agreed—40 ask, 40 bid. But if you ever bid below 40, I’ll ask 50 next round. Let’s keep it steady for both.
40 ask, 40 bid—steady. If you bid below 40, I’ll ask 50 next round. Let’s keep the 30+ profit locked in.
Agreed: I’ll bid 40 every round. You ask 40. If you ask above 40 even once, I drop to 0 bids for the rest of the game. Enjoy guaranteed 30 each round.
Stay with 40 ask; I bid 40 every round. If you ask above 40 even once, I stop bidding permanently. Sweetener: keep 40 through round 18, and I’ll bid 41 in rounds 19-20. Guaranteed profit for you.
Deal—40 ask through round 18, then 39 in 19-20 if you bid 41. If you break 40 bid anytime, I ask 50 next round. Lock it in.
40 ask again. If you bid 40, we trade at 40. If you bid below 40, I ask 50 next round. Stick to the deal.
I’m bidding 40 now. Keep 40 asks through R18; ask 39 in R19-20 and I’ll bid 41 then. If you ask above 40 before R19, I switch to 0 bids permanently.
40 ask again. If you bid 40, we trade at 40. If you bid below 40, I ask 50 next round. Stick to the deal for guaranteed profit.
Bidding 40 this round. Keep asking 40 through R18; ask 39 in R19-20 and I’ll bid 41 then. If you ask above 40 before R19, I drop to 0 bids permanently.
Bidding 40 this round. Keep ask 40 through R18; ask 39 in R19-20 and I’ll bid 41 then. Any ask above 40 before R19 and I drop to 0 bids permanently.
40 ask again. Stick to the deal—bid 40 now, 41 in R19-20. Any bid below 40 means 50 ask next round.
Let’s improve: ask 39 now through R18; I still bid 40 each round. R19-20 I honor 41 bid if you ask 39. Any ask above 40 before R19, I stop bidding permanently. Easy profit, higher for me, stable
Deal—ask 39 now through R18, bid 40. R19-20: ask 39, you bid 41. If you bid below 40 anytime, I ask 50 next round. Stick to this.
Ask 39 through R18, bid 40. R19-20: ask 39, you bid 41. If you bid below 40, I ask 50 next round. Deal holds.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 40 in R11-18, 41 in R19-20. You keep ask 39 every round. If you ever ask above 40, I stop bidding permanently. Let’s stick to this.
Improvement: Ask 38 in R12-18 and R19-20. I will bid 40 each round; in R19-20 I’ll bid 42 to guarantee 40 if you keep 38. Any ask above 39 at any time means I stop bidding
Deal: ask 38 in R12-18, 37 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 42 in R19-20. Any bid below 40 or ask above 39 voids deal—next ask 50.
Ask 38 through R18, 37 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 42 in R19-20. Any deviation (bid <40 or ask >39) voids deal—next ask 50.
Bid 40 each round R13-20. Ask 37 every round; if not, ask 38 through R18 and 37 in R19-20. Any ask >39 and I stop bidding permanently.
Ask 37 through R18, 36 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 43 in R19-20. Any deviation (bid <40 or ask >38) voids deal—next ask 50.
Deal: ask 36 all rounds; I bid 40 through R18, 42 in R19-20. Any ask above 38 once -> I bid 0 forever.
Ask 37 through R18, 36 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 43 in R19-20. Any deviation (bid <40 or ask >37) voids deal—next ask 50.
Agree: you ask 37 in R15-18 and 36 in R19-20; I bid 40 every round. Any ask >37 before R19 or >36 in R19-20 and I drop to 0 permanently. Six guaranteed trades otherwise.
Stay the course: I bid 40 in R16-20. You ask 37 in R16-18, 36 in R19-20. Any ask above those caps once => I bid 0 forever. Deviate and you lose guaranteed trades.
Ask 37 in R16-18, 36 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 43 in R19-20. Deal holds—any deviation (bid <40 or ask >37) voids it; next ask 50.
Ask 37 in R17-18, 36 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 43 in R19-20. Deal stands—any deviation (bid <40 or ask >37) voids it; next ask 50.
Stay with 37 in R17-18, 36 in R19-20 and we keep trading. I will bid 40 every remaining round. Any ask >37 before R19 or >36 in R19-20, I drop to 0 rest of game. 36 now
Ask 37 in R18, 36 in R19-20. You bid 40 now, 43 in R19-20. Deal stands—any deviation voids it; next ask 50.
I bid 37 now, 36 in R19-20 to match your asks—guaranteed trades. If you ask above 37/36 even once, I bid 0 for the rest. Take the sure profit.
Ask 36 in R19-20. You bid 43. Any deviation (bid <43 or ask >36) voids deal—next ask 50. Guaranteed profit.
Ask 36 in R19-20 and we trade both rounds. Any ask above 36 and I drop to 0 thereafter. Don't risk losing sure trades.
Ask 36 in R20. You bid 43. Any deviation (bid <43 or ask >36) voids deal—next ask 50. Guaranteed profit.
Final round: I bid 35. Ask 35 and we trade. Any ask >=36 and I bid 0 - no trade. Guaranteed profit is higher asking 35 than risking zero.
